steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
The mixture equation is $$0.10x + 0.20y = 0.19(x+y)$$

Substitute the given value $x = 50$:
$$0.10(50) + 0.20y = 0.19(50 + y)$$
$$5 + 0.20y = 9.5 + 0.19y$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Subtract $0.19y$ from both sides:
$$5 + 0.01y = 9.5$$

Subtract 5 from both sides:
$$0.01y = 4.5$$

Divide by $0.01$:
$$y = 450$$

The answer is 450.
